ksa_text: Knowledge of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms, including their mathematical foundations, hyperparameter behavior, and appropriate application conditions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-001 (AI and Machine Learning/Knowledge) is excluded as edge_case (composite 0.394, highest: NICE at 0.394). No data engineering pattern signals found. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.394, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.394)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of 500+ DE job postings (2023-2025) does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard IC/senior IC requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
